title: 第一章 苔铃外庭
theme: 苔藓庭院、钟廊、湿木台阶、地下根道
scale_intent: 不复刻商业地图，只采用大体量银河恶魔城的通用节奏：长主线、多支路、能力回访、捷径闭环、Boss 前短跑。
loop_note: 用钟塔纵井把前庭、温室、巢厅三层打通，Boss 前存档到战场不超过 2 房间。

metroidvania_design_rules.inspiration_boundary: Use original map layouts only; borrow genre principles such as vertical hubs, gated return paths, and shortcut compression.
chapter_arc: show locked routes before the key ability
open optional branches with visible rewards
keep boss runback short after the final save

cluster_macro_rules.entry_spine: early readable spine with a few visible branches
cluster_macro_rules.tall_shaft: vertical memory anchor that later abilities compress
cluster_macro_rules.loop_gallery: wide loop that returns to a known room
cluster_macro_rules.reward_cave: optional pocket cluster with risk/reward exits
cluster_macro_rules.wide_canal: horizontal travel band broken by vertical callbacks
cluster_macro_rules.boss_run: late gauntlet with short save-to-boss runback

legend.main_route: 红箭头：一周目主线推进
legend.branch: 蓝线：支线、奖励房、区域内连接
legend.shortcut: 绿虚箭：从背面开启的捷径
legend.ability_gate: 紫虚箭：能力门或回访门，线中标注需求能力
legend.npc: N：剧情 NPC、商人、地图师或提示者
legend.reward: R：护符、货币、生命碎片或剧情道具

rooms.name: 旧驿门厅1
rooms.design_goal: Teach the first landmark, safe footing, and the chapter visual language.
rooms.reward_contract: orientation, map silhouette, first safe return point
rooms.micro_objective: Enter safely, read the bell tower silhouette, and learn the main route color language.
rooms.landmark: broken station gate under a hanging moss bell
rooms.mechanic_prompt: Safe floor, one optional ledge, no punishment.
rooms.playtest_note: Player should understand the first destination within ten seconds.

rooms.name: 旧驿门厅2
rooms.design_goal: Carry the upward pilgrimage through a readable critical path.
rooms.reward_contract: forward progress and landmark reveal

rooms.name: 旧驿门厅3
rooms.design_goal: Let the player see a goal or route before they can reach it.
rooms.reward_contract: foreshadowed destination
rooms.micro_objective: Rest at the first save and see a locked return path above the main route.
rooms.landmark: small balcony save point looking over the entry spine
rooms.mechanic_prompt: Show an upper route before it is useful.
rooms.playtest_note: Player should remember this balcony when a later shortcut opens.

rooms.name: 旧驿门厅4
rooms.design_goal: Carry the upward pilgrimage through a readable critical path.
rooms.reward_contract: forward progress and landmark reveal

rooms.name: 旧驿门厅5
rooms.design_goal: Offer optional risk with a clean exit back to the main route.
rooms.reward_contract: currency, lore, health shard, or tool material
rooms.micro_objective: Drop into a safe lower pocket, meet the route hint NPC, and return to the spine.
rooms.landmark: low moss alcove with map witness
rooms.mechanic_prompt: Teach optional detour with no permanent commitment.
rooms.playtest_note: Optional pocket should not feel like the critical path.

rooms.name: 旧驿门厅6
rooms.design_goal: Carry the upward pilgrimage through a readable critical path.
rooms.reward_contract: forward progress and landmark reveal

rooms.name: 旧驿门厅7
rooms.design_goal: Show a closed return path first, then let the far side open it.
rooms.reward_contract: shorter runback and stronger world memory
rooms.micro_objective: See a sealed shortcut door from the wrong side before reaching its lever later.
rooms.landmark: green-etched locked grate facing the entry route
rooms.playtest_note: Player should see why opening this will shorten travel.

rooms.name: 苔钟前庭1
rooms.design_goal: Create a memorable local hub that reconnects branches after exploration.
rooms.reward_contract: route choice, NPC hint, shortcut awareness
rooms.micro_objective: Choose between the main path, upper shaft, and reward branch while keeping the bell tower visible.
rooms.landmark: wide bell court with three visible exits
rooms.playtest_note: This room is the first place the map should feel non-linear but readable.

rooms.name: 苔钟前庭2
rooms.design_goal: Make height change visible so later abilities recontextualize the room.
rooms.reward_contract: future gate sightline or upper route preview
rooms.micro_objective: Climb a partial shaft and preview a ledge that will become easier after the first ability.
rooms.landmark: mossy vertical shaft with a high brass lip
rooms.playtest_note: Falling should return the player to a known floor, not punish heavily.

rooms.name: 苔钟前庭3
rooms.design_goal: Make height change visible so later abilities recontextualize the room.
rooms.reward_contract: future gate sightline or upper route preview

rooms.name: 苔钟前庭4
rooms.design_goal: Make height change visible so later abilities recontextualize the room.
rooms.reward_contract: future gate sightline or upper route preview
rooms.micro_objective: Cross the shaft midpoint, collect a side reward, and identify the lower return passage.
rooms.mechanic_prompt: Reward placed on the way, not in a blind dead end.
rooms.playtest_note: Reward should be visible before the player commits to the climb.

rooms.name: 苔钟前庭5
rooms.design_goal: Make height change visible so later abilities recontextualize the room.
rooms.reward_contract: future gate sightline or upper route preview

rooms.name: 苔钟前庭6
rooms.design_goal: Make height change visible so later abilities recontextualize the room.
rooms.reward_contract: future gate sightline or upper route preview

rooms.name: 苔钟前庭7
rooms.design_goal: Show a closed return path first, then let the far side open it.
rooms.reward_contract: shorter runback and stronger world memory
rooms.micro_objective: Find the second shortcut lock and understand that the shaft will later fold back on itself.
rooms.landmark: sealed root gate beside lower shaft water
rooms.playtest_note: This should make the shaft feel like a future loop, not a ladder.

rooms.name: 雨棚廊桥1
rooms.design_goal: Create a memorable local hub that reconnects branches after exploration.
rooms.reward_contract: route choice, NPC hint, shortcut awareness
rooms.micro_objective: Enter the rain canopy loop and read both the high branch and lower return route.
rooms.playtest_note: Player should see at least two exits without opening the map.

rooms.name: 雨棚廊桥2
rooms.design_goal: Immediately prove the value of a new ability before using it as a gate.
rooms.reward_contract: new ability and one obvious use case
rooms.micro_objective: Pick up the first chapter ability and immediately use it to cross a short, safe span.
rooms.landmark: thread hook shrine above the canopy
rooms.mechanic_prompt: New ability, then one obvious application.
rooms.playtest_note: Failing the tutorial jump should reset locally without long travel.

rooms.name: 雨棚廊桥3
rooms.design_goal: Wrap the player back near a known room after a longer detour.
rooms.reward_contract: spatial memory and return-path compression
rooms.micro_objective: Talk to the route hint NPC, then choose main bridge or lower loop.
rooms.playtest_note: NPC line should confirm that the area loops back.

rooms.name: 雨棚廊桥4
rooms.design_goal: Wrap the player back near a known room after a longer detour.
rooms.reward_contract: spatial memory and return-path compression

rooms.name: 雨棚廊桥5
rooms.design_goal: Wrap the player back near a known room after a longer detour.
rooms.reward_contract: spatial memory and return-path compression

rooms.name: 雨棚廊桥6
rooms.design_goal: Wrap the player back near a known room after a longer detour.
rooms.reward_contract: spatial memory and return-path compression
rooms.micro_objective: Take the upper loop reward and drop back near the main route.
rooms.playtest_note: Reward detour target time should stay under 45 seconds.

rooms.name: 雨棚廊桥7
rooms.design_goal: Show a closed return path first, then let the far side open it.
rooms.reward_contract: shorter runback and stronger world memory
rooms.micro_objective: Open the canopy shortcut from the far side and feel the route collapse back to the hub.
rooms.landmark: lever room with visible locked grate below
rooms.playtest_note: After opening, runback to the hub should be obviously shorter.

rooms.name: 根须蓄水井1
rooms.design_goal: Create a memorable local hub that reconnects branches after exploration.
rooms.reward_contract: route choice, NPC hint, shortcut awareness
rooms.micro_objective: Enter the root well, survive a small elite fight, and earn access to the lower water loop.
rooms.mechanic_prompt: First pressure spike after route learning.
rooms.playtest_note: This is a checkpoint for combat pressure, not navigation confusion.

rooms.name: 根须蓄水井2
rooms.design_goal: Offer optional risk with a clean exit back to the main route.
rooms.reward_contract: currency, lore, health shard, or tool material

rooms.name: 根须蓄水井3
rooms.design_goal: Offer optional risk with a clean exit back to the main route.
rooms.reward_contract: currency, lore, health shard, or tool material
rooms.micro_objective: Recover after the well fight and choose whether to press into the lower reward pocket.
rooms.playtest_note: Save placement should make the next experiment feel fair.

rooms.name: 根须蓄水井4
rooms.design_goal: Offer optional risk with a clean exit back to the main route.
rooms.reward_contract: currency, lore, health shard, or tool material

rooms.reward_contract: shorter runback and stronger world memory

implementation_notes: 单张 PNG 是关卡设计用俯视拓扑图，不是最终游戏内小地图贴图。
房间矩形留有较大间距，便于在 Aseprite/Tiled/Godot 中拆成独立区域。
红线为一周目主线，蓝线为支线，绿线为已解锁捷径，紫线为能力门/回访门。
每章 Boss 前必须保留短路径存档点，避免玩家死亡后重复跑长线。
